generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a mother and professional, I've always believed in personal responsibility. But when it comes to national security, we can't just rely on volunteers. Our allies like South Korea and Israel understand this - mandatory service ensures readiness and fairness. The idea that conscription is 'outdated' ignores how quickly threats evolve. Would you trust our defense to only those who 'choose' to serve? #NationalSecurity #DutyMatters
